location: Dropped by a lone Rotten Duelist standing at a cliff edge northwest of Ordina, Liturgical Town in the Consecrated Snowfield.
tactics: From the Ordina, Liturgical Town Site of Grace, ride west/northwest clear of the town buildings, then turn north to spot the Duelist near the cliff
It can inflict Scarlet Rot two ways — a breath attack and its axe swings — so bring rot resistance or be ready to cure it
It also drops the matching Rotten Duelist Greaves, so one kill nets two items
lore: A gladiator's greataxe once wielded by duelists exiled from the Colosseum, now left to fester with Scarlet Rot after long exposure to the blighted Consecrated Snowfield.

builds.name: Dex-leaning rot quality build
builds.why: Unusually for a colossal weapon it scales better with Dexterity (C) than Strength (E), and its built-in Scarlet Rot buildup rewards a rot-application playstyle.
